items.how_used: 对出生数与种群规模进行线性回归，得到 B(P) = 0.35P + 7.5，R²=0.83，并用残差图验证线性假设。
items.source_excerpt: We determined B(P) by finding the Least-Squares Line describing the relationship between births, the response variable, and population size, the explanatory variable, obtaining the following equation, with R2 = 0.83

items.how_used: 对出生数与种群规模的平方根进行线性回归，得到 B(P) = 4.4√P + 1.5，R²=0.84，以体现K-选择物种的密度依赖效应。
items.source_excerpt: we decided to reexpress the data by taking the square root of population size and again finding the Least-Squares Line, which had R2 = 0.84.

items.how_used: 建立种群增长微分方程 dP/dt = B(P) - D(P)，其中 D(P) 为各死亡因素之和，并用欧拉法数值求解。
items.source_excerpt: Population growth is the derivative of population with respect to time, so we were left with an unsolvable differential equation. Consequently, we used Euler’s method and a step size of 1 year to derive a graph for population over time.

items.how_used: 绘制残差图检查线性回归假设的合理性，确认无趋势后认为模型适用。
items.source_excerpt: Our scatterplot and residuals plot (shown in the image below) suggest that a linear model appears appropriate for the data provided, because there are no trends in the residuals (Fig. 1).

items.how_used: 使用 R² 评估回归模型的拟合优度，出生线性模型 R²=0.83，平方根变换后 R²=0.84。
items.source_excerpt: with R2 = 0.83, implying a moderately strong linear fit

items.how_used: 通过改变各死亡因素（如疾病、事故）的系数，分析对种群最终规模的影响，并提出管理建议。
items.source_excerpt: In order to improve the survival of the elk population, we then analyzed the effects of altering each variable and devised a method to increase the carrying capacity of the Great Smoky Mountains National Park.

items.how_used: 列出8条模型假设，包括忽略引入年份数据、忽略零死亡数据点、合并事故与未知死亡、寿命13年等，并给出合理解释。
items.source_excerpt: Assumption: The data points from the years that new elk are reintroduced can be ignored. Justification: These elk were not part of the local habitat for the entire year...

items.how_used: 论文采用 IMRaD 结构：引言、假设、变量、模型构建（分节）、灵敏度分析、讨论（优缺点、未来研究）、参考文献、附录。
